rules.column: fixed acidity,volatile acidity,citric acid,residual sugar,chlorides,free sulfur dioxide,total sulfur dioxide,density,pH,sulphates,alcohol,quality

rules.hint: Each class value maps to exactly one veil_type value: type=veil_type, p=p, e=p
Each cap_shape value maps to exactly one veil_type value: cap_shape=veil_type, x=p, b=p, s=p, f=p, k=p, c=p
Each cap_surface value maps to exactly one veil_type value: cap_surface=veil_type, s=p, y=p, f=p, g=p
Each cap_color value maps to exactly one veil_type value: cap_color=veil_type, n=p, y=p, w=p, g=p, e=p, p=p, b=p (+3 more)
Each bruises value maps to exactly one veil_type value: bruises=veil_type, t=p, f=p
Each odor value maps to exactly one veil_type value: odor=veil_type, p=p, a=p, l=p, n=p, f=p, c=p, y=p (+2 more)
Each gill_attachment value maps to exactly one veil_type value: gill_attachment=veil_type, f=p, a=p
Each gill_spacing value maps to exactly one veil_type value: gill_spacing=veil_type, c=p, w=p
Each gill_size value maps to exactly one veil_type value: gill_size=veil_type, n=p, b=p
Each gill_color value maps to exactly one veil_type value: gill_color=veil_type, k=p, n=p, g=p, p=p, w=p, h=p, u=p (+5 more)
Each stalk_shape value maps to exactly one veil_type value: stalk_shape=veil_type, e=p, t=p
Each stalk_root value maps to exactly one veil_type value: stalk_root=veil_type, e=p, c=p, b=p, r=p, ?=p
Each stalk_surface_above_ring value maps to exactly one veil_type value: stalk_surface_above_ring=veil_type, s=p, f=p, k=p, y=p
Each stalk_surface_below_ring value maps to exactly one veil_type value: stalk_surface_below_ring=veil_type, s=p, f=p, y=p, k=p
Each stalk_color_above_ring value maps to exactly one veil_type value: stalk_color_above_ring=veil_type, w=p, g=p, p=p, n=p, b=p, e=p, o=p (+2 more)
Each stalk_color_below_ring value maps to exactly one veil_type value: stalk_color_below_ring=veil_type, w=p, p=p, g=p, b=p, n=p, e=p, y=p (+2 more)
Each veil_color value maps to exactly one veil_type value: veil_color=veil_type, w=p, n=p, o=p, y=p
Each ring_number value maps to exactly one veil_type value: ring_number=veil_type, o=p, t=p, n=p
Each ring_type value maps to exactly one veil_type value: ring_type=veil_type, p=p, e=p, l=p, f=p, n=p
Each spore_print_color value maps to exactly one veil_type value: spore_print_color=veil_type, k=p, n=p, u=p, h=p, w=p, r=p, o=p (+2 more)
Each population value maps to exactly one veil_type value: population=veil_type, s=p, n=p, a=p, v=p, y=p, c=p
Each habitat value maps to exactly one veil_type value: habitat=veil_type, u=p, g=p, m=p, d=p, p=p, w=p, l=p
